title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lenovo India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lenovo India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
